name: IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_VL
query: SELECT IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.CUSTOM_FONT_ID CUSTOM_FONT_ID, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.SITE_NUMBER SITE_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.FONT_NUMBER FONT_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_TL.FONT_NAME FONT_NAME FROM IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_TL WHERE IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_B.CUSTOM_FONT_ID =IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_TL.CUSTOM_FONT_ID AND IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
